texto: Today, unlocking the room and stepping into its dusty embrace, it struck her – the bareness, the cobwebs in the corners, the dark squares on the walls where the maps had once hung, the intricately designed tiles disappeared in filth, the urn-less, roseless emptiness, the laughter that once was. Sighs everywhere, and echoes, the papery trail of ants through the ancient wood, the still, suspended sheets of dust, and through it all, those memories, still alive, still alive.
explicacao: Citação de Debotri Dhar sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “Today, unlocking the room and stepping into its dusty embrace, it struck her – the bareness, the …” articula reflexao, memories, still em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como termino e reflexao-noturna.
